channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Super Bowl delivers moving tributes, memorable action and a historic presidential visit
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — The Philadelphia Eagles defeated the Kansas City Chiefs 40-22 in the first Super Bowl to be held in New Orleans in a dozen years.
item.dc:creator: BRETT MARTEL, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Track's proposed eligibility, transgender rules would completely ban Semenya and others
item.description: Track and field moved toward adopting rules that would place athletes assigned female at birth but have higher testosterone levels, like Caster Semenya, under the same set of rules as transgender athletes who were born male and transitioned to female.
item.dc:creator: EDDIE PELLS, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Brewers unveil patch they will wear on their uniforms to honor Bob Uecker
item.description: MILWAUKEE (AP) — The Milwaukee Brewers have unveiled a patch they will wear on their uniform this season to honor longtime broadcaster Bob Uecker, who died last month. The patch will appear on the sleeve of the Brewers’ uniforms.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Anthony Davis is out with groin strain for second game with Mavs amid reports of longer absence
item.description: DALLAS (AP) — Anthony Davis has been ruled out of what would have been his second game with the Mavericks amid reports that a groin injury sustained in his Dallas debut could sideline him for multiple weeks.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: NBA adds Atlanta's Trae Young to All-Star Game as injury replacement
item.description: Atlanta guard Trae Young is headed to the NBA All-Star Game after all. Commissioner Adam Silver announced Monday that he has added Young to the All-Star roster as an injury replacement for Milwaukee forward Giannis Antetokounmpo, who will not be able to play because of a calf injury.
item.dc:creator: TIM REYNOLDS, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Chiefs' Travis Kelce walks off field downcast after Super Bowl LIX loss in possible final game
item.description: Kansas City Chiefs tight end Travis Kelce appeared downcast as he walked off the field following the team's blowout Super Bowl LIX loss to hte Philadelphia Eagles.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Bay Area has bright history of all-star game moments
item.description: The NBA All-Star Game arrives at his third different Bay Area venue when the Warriors' Chase Center plays host Sunday, Feb. 16.
item.dc:creator: Cam Inman, The Mercury News

item.title: Shiffrin says she's dealing with PTSD after crash and won't defend giant slalom title at ski worlds
item.description: Mikaela Shiffrin says she is dealing with post-traumatic stress disorder following a crash in November and will not defend her gold medal in giant slalom at the Alpine skiing world championships.
item.dc:creator: Andrew Dampf, Associated Press, Local 4

item.title: Eagles defense smothers Mahomes and dominates Kansas City in franchise's second Super Bowl win
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — Cooper DeJean took an interception to the house, Zack Baun made a pick in his old professional home and the Eagles so thoroughly thrashed Patrick Mahomes that by the time Kendrick Lamar had “Game Over” brightened in the Superdome stands to end his halftime set, it was just as clea
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jalen Hurts quiets any doubters with a Super Bowl MVP
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — Jalen Hurts has often been judged by his failings more than his successes over the course of his career. Getting benched at halftime of a college football championship game. Being forced to transfer from Alabama to Oklahoma just to be able to regain a starting job.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Officials' calls prove not to be decisive as Eagles dominate in Super Bowl
item.description: NEW ORLEANS (AP) — The officials were a big storyline headed into the Super Bowl thanks in part to social media conspiracy theories about favoritism toward the Kansas City Chiefs. They were a big part of the first quarter of the game with both teams ending up on the wrong side of a close call.
item.dc:creator: JOSH DUBOW, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Eagles win Super Bowl LIX, denying Chiefs history in dominant fashion
item.description: The Philadelphia Eagles said no to NFL history from the Kansas City Chiefs on Sunday in New Orleans, as they dominated their opponent to win Super Bowl LIX.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Tom Brady disagrees with referees on controversial pass interference call against Eagles in Super Bowl LIX
item.description: A deep-ball connection between Jalen Hurts and receiver A.J. Brown ended up not being a big play for the Philadelphia Eagles in Super Bowl LIX.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Eagles' Cooper DeJean celebrates his 22nd birthday with a Super Bowl first
item.description: Cooper DeJean became the first player in Super Bowl history to intercept a pass or score a touchdown on his birthday when he returned a poor throw by Patrick Mahomes 38 yards for a TD to give Philadelphia a 17-0 lead over Kansas City in the second quarter.
item.dc:creator: Josh Dubow, Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Eagles rookie, celebrating his 22nd birthday, records pick-6 in Super Bowl LIX for first NFL interception
item.description: Cooper DeJean's first NFL interception was a memorable one: It was a pick-six that came in the Super Bowl on his 22nd birthday.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Super Bowl LIX: Eagles Cooper DeJean scores pick-six on birthday
item.description: Eagles defensive back Cooper DeJean made an already memorable 22nd birthday even bigger during Super Bowl LIX.
item.dc:creator: George Stockburger, WFLA, NBC

item.title: 76ers' Embiid says he's 'looking into every option' if his knee is bothering him at end of season
item.description: MILWAUKEE (AP) — Philadelphia 76ers center Joel Embiid acknowledged Sunday he may have to undergo another surgery on the left knee that has bothered him the last year if it isn’t feeling any better by the end of the season.
item.dc:creator: STEVE MEGARGEE, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Thomas Detry gets his first PGA Tour victory, a 7-shot romp at the Phoenix Open
item.description: SCOTTSDALE, Ariz. (AP) — Being in contention had always put Thomas Detry on fast-forward. His heart raced and his mind looked ahead instead of focusing on the moment.
item.dc:creator: JOHN MARSHALL, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Jazz come back to beat Warriors, 131-128
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Jordan Clarkson scored 31 points and Keyonte George added 26 to lead the Utah Jazz to a 131-128 victory over the Golden State Warriors on Wednesday night. Isaiah Collier added 20 points and 11 assists.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Rams headed Down Under for NFL's 1st game in Australia
item.description: LOS ANGELES (KTLA) — The Los Angeles Rams are set to make NFL history Down Under next year. The squad announced Wednesday that they're headed to Melbourne, Australia, in 2026 to play the league's first regular season game in the country.
item.dc:creator: Cameron Kiszla, KTLA 5
